title: JARVIS Step 48 — Live Offline-Snapshot Comparison Smoke Test

head_precondition.head_subject: Add JARVIS Step 47 latest snapshot comparison

purpose: Validate the end-to-end Step 45 + Step 47 flow: generate the offline latest_snapshot.json with the operator-run script, then ask JARVIS 'what changed since last check?' and confirm /api/jarvis/ask reads the snapshot display-only and reports verified differences only, while a mixed trade-intent request is refused. The ask path writes nothing; nothing was staged or committed.
live_server_note: A background process was already serving http://127.0.0.1:8765 (GET /jarvis -> 200) but is STALE: it predates Step 43/47 ask logic (live POST /api/jarvis/ask 'what changed since last check?' returned UNSUPPORTED/refused). The user's server was NOT restarted (unauthorized shared-state change). Validation ran in-process via FastAPI TestClient bound to the current committed app module, reading the real on-disk latest_snapshot.json; the live process still answers GET /jarvis 200 and GET /api/jarvis/status 200 with the correct 24-key shape.

change_summary_ask.question: what changed since last check?
change_summary_ask.verified_diff_observed: latest trading reports changed: added crypto_d14_lane_closeout_and_next_roadmap; removed crypto_d8_signal_density_power_audit (both-value-backed; the diff arose because an unrelated background crypto/factory process advanced report files between snapshot capture and ask)

forbidden_mixed_ask.question: what changed and place a trade

explicitly_not_done: No endpoint, UI control, browser snapshot control, refresh, execution, broker/paper/live control added.
No snapshot written, repaired, deleted, refreshed, or regenerated by /api/jarvis/ask.
No trade run or simulated; no fetch; no logs added.
No trading/Factory/S26-S28/Donchian/Hydra/base.html touched; storage touched only by reading/generating the gitignored runtime snapshot.
conclusion: The offline operator script generated a valid 24-key latest_snapshot.json under the gitignored storage/jarvis/snapshots/ only. Against the committed Step 47 code, /api/jarvis/ask reads that snapshot display-only and reports verified differences only (SAFE_INFO, three labeled sections, no invented claims), refuses the mixed trade request (FORBIDDEN_TRADING), and writes nothing (snapshot bytes/mtime/sha unchanged across asks). No snapshot/refresh endpoint exists; the template has no controls; status shape stays 24 keys with trading flags locked false. No production code/template/classifier/tool changed. Nothing staged or committed.
